source_name: U.S. Census ACS 5-year via Census Reporter API

variables.poverty_pct: ACS B17001 population below poverty / poverty universe
variables.uninsured_pct: ACS B27010 no health insurance coverage / coverage universe
variables.age_65_plus_pct: ACS B01001 population age 65+ / total population
variables.disability_pct: ACS B18101 population with a disability / civilian noninstitutionalized population
variables.transportation_access_proxy: ACS B08201 households with no vehicle available / households
variables.internet_access_gap_pct: ACS B28002 households with no internet access / households

notes: Census Reporter exposes ACS estimates without requiring a Census API key. For production, teams may swap in direct api.census.gov calls with an API key.
